calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Aug-22-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for hearing on Petition for Name Change. Petitioner sworn and examined. Court orders Petitioner's name changed to Rosemary Jordan Madrigal. Decree signed.
